instruction.text:
UlwLoop aggregate-goal handoff
Mode: aggregate
Plan: .omo/ulw-loop/roadmap-button-removal-20260623/goals.json
Ledger: .omo/ulw-loop/roadmap-button-removal-20260623/ledger.jsonl
Goal: G005-browser-screenshot-artifacts-for-cri — Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3.

Active goal:
- id: G005-browser-screenshot-artifacts-for-cri
- title: Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3.
- objective: Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3.

Success criteria:
- [C001] [essential] (happy) happy path for: Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3. — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 5. — status: pass
- [C002] [essential] (edge) edge case (boundary/empty/malformed) — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3.. — status: pass
- remaining work: [C003] [non-essential] (regression) regression: adjacent surface still works — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Browser screenshot artifacts for criterion 3.. — status: pending

Codex goal integration constraints:
- Use the create_goal payload exactly as rendered: objective only.
- Goals are unlimited. Do not add numeric limits.
- Codex goal = the whole omo ulw-loop run; OMO G001/G002/etc. = ledger stories.
- First call get_goal. If no active goal exists, call create_goal with the aggregate payload below.
- If get_goal reports the same aggregate objective as active, continue this OMO story without creating a new Codex goal.
- If a different active or incomplete Codex goal exists, finish/checkpoint that goal before starting this ulw-loop.
- This is the final story; update_goal is allowed only after the mandatory quality gate passes.
Final story — run mandatory quality gate before update_goal:
- Run targeted verification for changed behavior.
- Confirm every manualQa artifact path exists and has non-zero size.
- Spawn final reviewers with fork_context=false: lazycodex-code-reviewer, lazycodex-qa-executor, and lazycodex-gate-reviewer. Include the original brief, goal objectives, desired user-visible outcome, diff, and evidence.
- Require clean codeReview, manualQa, gateReview, iteration, and criteriaCoverage. criteriaCoverage must summarize originalIntent, desiredOutcome, and userOutcomeReview; counts alone are not approval.
- If any reviewer is blocked/inconclusive or the quality gate is not clean, do not call update_goal. Record blocker work first:
  omo ulw-loop record-review-blockers --session-id roadmap-button-removal-20260623 --goal-id G005-browser-screenshot-artifacts-for-cri --title "Resolve final code-review blockers" --objective "<blocker-resolution objective>" --evidence "<review findings>" --codex-goal-json "<active get_goal JSON or path>"
- If the quality gate is clean, call update_goal({status: "complete"}), call get_goal again, then checkpoint the aggregate story:
  omo ulw-loop checkpoint --session-id roadmap-button-removal-20260623 --goal-id G005-browser-screenshot-artifacts-for-cri --status complete --evidence "<targeted verification/manualQa/gateReview evidence>" --codex-goal-json "<fresh complete get_goal JSON or path>" --quality-gate-json "<quality gate JSON or path>"
- Checkpoint this OMO story with a fresh get_goal snapshot whose objective matches the aggregate payload.
- If blocked or failed, checkpoint with --status failed and the failure evidence; rerun complete-goals --session-id roadmap-button-removal-20260623 --retry-failed to resume.
